# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

- Be respectful and constructive in all interactions
- Focus feedback on code and ideas, not people
- Accept differing viewpoints and experience levels
- Prioritise the long-term health of the project

## Unacceptable Behaviour

- Harassment, insults, or personal attacks
- Publishing others' private information without consent
- Any conduct that would be considered inappropriate in a professional setting

## Enforcement

Violations may result in removal from the project. Report issues to the maintainers directly.
